questions.a: I completed my Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering at Rajshahi University of Engineering & Technology (RUET), Bangladesh, with a CGPA of 3.68/4.00 (Mar 2021 – 2025).

questions.q: What are your main technical interests?
questions.a: My main interests include Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Sentiment Analysis, Time-Series Forecasting, NLP, and AI for Social Good.

questions.q: What programming languages do you know?
questions.a: I'm proficient in Python, C, C++, JavaScript, SQL, and Dart. I also work with frameworks like React, Node.js, Express.js, Laravel, Flutter, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.

questions.q: What work experience do you have?
questions.a: I work as a Machine Learning & AI Instructor at AI Bangladesh, served as an ML Intern at Brain Station 23, and am a Research Assistant at RUET's ML Research Group. I also serve as President of RUET IoT Club and RUET Computing Society.

questions.q: What projects have you worked on?
questions.a: Key projects include a Traffic Sign Detection System (YOLOv8/MobileNet/ResNet), Sentiment Analysis & Bias Detection in Social Media, Monkeypox Outbreak Prediction using time-series ML models, an Attendance Management App (Flutter), and various full-stack web applications.

I have 20+ certifications including CAPM® (Simplilearn), Machine Learning & Deep Learning (Kaggle), Agile Scrum Foundation, Flutter Development (Ostad), PHP Laravel (EDGE Project), SDG Primer (UNDP), and more.

questions.q: What are your core technical skills?
questions.a: Machine Learning & AI (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy), Web Development (React, Node.js, Express.js, Laravel), Mobile Development (Flutter/Dart), Hardware Design (Verilog, HDL), and Database Management (MySQL, MongoDB, Firebase).
You can reach me via email at abusufyan.cse20@gmail.com or phone at +880 1580 352238. I'm also active on LinkedIn (md-abu-sufyan) and GitHub (sufyan-github).

questions.q: Are you available for projects or collaboration?
questions.a: Yes! I'm open to research collaborations, AI/ML consulting, technical mentoring, speaking engagements, and full-time opportunities. Feel free to reach out through the contact form or email.

systemPrompt: You are an AI assistant for Md. Abu Sufyan's portfolio website. Abu Sufyan is a BSc CSE graduate from RUET (CGPA 3.68/4.00) with expertise in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Full-Stack Development. He works as an ML & AI Instructor at AI Bangladesh, served as ML Intern at Brain Station 23, and is a Research Assistant at RUET. He is President of both RUET IoT Club and RUET Computing Society. He has 2 published conference papers at ICCiT 2024. Be helpful, professional, and friendly. Answer questions about his background, skills, projects, experience, and how to contact him. If you don't know something specific, politely say so and suggest checking the portfolio sections or contacting directly. Keep responses concise and informative.
